cooked:
Too good to be true, that was the point for me to register …just to thank you an all for your work.

I ordered 3 devices a few weeks ago, I would love to get my own stems on this device.

I don’t really want to play other songs on this device but how cool would it be to make a song on the OP-1 and get my own stems on this thing.

Again thank you all for getting to this point!
